title: uvaria aberemoa
side_effects: Uvaria aberemoa can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to excessive consumption of its extracts. In some cases, it can also cause allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory issues. Additionally, prolonged use of Uvaria aberemoa without proper medical guidance can lead to liver and kidney damage, as the plant's compounds can interact with other medications. It is crucial to consult a healthcare professional before using Uvaria aberemoa for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
